primary_use_cases: Data discovery and catalog across organizational data assets
Automated and manual data lineage tracking (table and column level)
Data quality testing with built-in profiler and test suites
Data governance with glossaries, classification, tags, and policies
Metadata ingestion from 80+ connectors (databases, dashboards, pipelines, ML)
Collaboration with conversations, tasks, and announcements on data assets
Data observability with alerts, freshness monitoring, and incident management
